sentences.sentence: The ping of a text message has never sounded so sweet.
sentences.translation: 短信提示音从未像现在这样悦耳。

structure.text: The ping of a text message
has never sounded
so sweet

difficult_points: has never sounded 使用现在完成时，强调此前从未有过这样的感受。
sound 是系动词，sweet 作表语，并非指味觉，而是形容声音令人愉悦。

sentences.sentence: In what is being touted as a world first, Kenya's biggest mobile operator is allowing subscribers to send cash to other phone users by SMS.
sentences.translation: 在这项被宣传为全球首创的服务中，肯尼亚最大的移动运营商正允许用户通过短信向其他手机用户汇款。

structure.text: In what is being touted as a world first
Kenya's biggest mobile operator is allowing subscribers
to send cash to other phone users by SMS

difficult_points: what 引导名词性从句，作介词 In 的宾语；is being touted 是进行时被动。
allow sb to do sth 表示允许用户做某事，by SMS 说明汇款方式。

sentences.sentence: Known as M-Pesa, or mobile money, the service is expected to revolutionise banking in a country where more than 80% of people are excluded from the formal financial sector.
sentences.translation: 这项被称为M-Pesa（即“移动货币”）的服务，有望彻底改变肯尼亚的银行业；该国80%以上的人口被正规金融体系拒之门外。

structure.text: Known as M-Pesa, or mobile money
the service is expected to revolutionise banking in a country
where more than 80% of people are excluded from the formal financial sector

difficult_points: Known as 是过去分词短语，逻辑主语为 the service；mobile money 是 M-Pesa 的同位解释。
where 指代 a country；are excluded from 表示大多数人无法进入正规金融体系。

sentences.sentence: Apart from transferring cash - a service much in demand among urban Kenyans supporting relatives in rural areas - customers of the Safaricom network will be able to keep up to 50,000 shillings (£370) in a "virtual account" on their handsets.
sentences.translation: 除了汇款——这项服务深受需要接济农村亲属的肯尼亚城市居民欢迎——Safaricom网络用户还可在手机的“虚拟账户”中存入最多5万先令（370英镑）。

structure.text: Apart from transferring cash
a service much in demand among urban Kenyans supporting relatives in rural areas
customers of the Safaricom network will be able to keep up to 50,000 shillings (£370) in a "virtual account" on their handsets

difficult_points: 破折号中的 a service 与 transferring cash 同位；supporting 修饰 urban Kenyans。
will be able to 表示未来能力，up to 表示金额上限。

sentences.sentence: Developed by Vodafone, which holds a 35% share in Safaricom, M-Pesa was formally launched in Kenya two weeks ago.
sentences.translation: M-Pesa由持有Safaricom 35%股份的沃达丰开发，两周前在肯尼亚正式推出。

structure.text: Developed by Vodafone
which holds a 35% share in Safaricom
M-Pesa was formally launched in Kenya two weeks ago

difficult_points: Developed by 的逻辑主语是 M-Pesa，说明开发者。
which 指代 Vodafone；was launched 是一般过去时的被动语态。

sentences.sentence: More than 10,000 people have signed up for the service, with around 8 million shillings transferred so far, mostly in tiny denominations.
sentences.translation: 已有一万多人注册该服务，迄今转账金额约800万先令，而且大多是小额转账。

structure.text: More than 10,000 people have signed up for the service
with around 8 million shillings transferred so far
mostly in tiny denominations

difficult_points: have signed up 使用现在完成时，表示截至目前的累计注册情况。
with + 名词 + 过去分词构成复合结构，补充累计转账金额。

sentences.sentence: Safaricom's executives are confident that growth will be strong in Kenya, and later across Africa.
sentences.translation: Safaricom的高管相信，这项服务将在肯尼亚强劲增长，随后还会扩展至整个非洲。

structure.text: Safaricom's executives are confident
that growth will be strong in Kenya, and later across Africa

difficult_points: that 从句补充 confident 的具体内容。
later across Africa 省略了重复的 growth will be strong，表示增长范围随后扩大。

sentences.sentence: "We are effectively giving people ATM cards without them ever having to open a real bank account,"said Michael Joseph, chief executive of Safaricom, who called the money transfer concept the"next big thing" in mobile telephony.
sentences.translation: “实际上，我们相当于给了人们提款卡，却无需他们开设真正的银行账户。”Safaricom首席执行官迈克尔·约瑟夫说；他把这种转账理念称为移动通信领域的“下一件大事”。

structure.text: We are effectively giving people ATM cards without them ever having to open a real bank account
said Michael Joseph
chief executive of Safaricom
who called the money transfer concept the"next big thing" in mobile telephony

difficult_points: without + them + having 构成复合结构，them 是 having 的逻辑主语。
who 指代 Michael Joseph；call + object + complement 中 the"next big thing" 是宾补。
account,"said 和 the"next 之间缺少空格是源文排版异常。

sentences.sentence: M-Pesa's is simple.
sentences.translation: M-Pesa的操作很简单。

structure.text: M-Pesa's
is
simple

difficult_points: 句子意在说明 M-Pesa 的使用方式简单。
M-Pesa's 中多余的所有格符号是源文语法异常，原样保留。

sentences.sentence: There is no need for a new handset or SIM card.
sentences.translation: 用户无需更换新手机或SIM卡。

structure.text: There is no need
for a new handset or SIM card

difficult_points: There is no need 表示“不需要”，是存现结构。
or 连接 new handset 与 SIM card 两个并列对象。

sentences.sentence: To send money, you hand over the cash to a registered agent - typically a retailer - who credits your virtual account.
sentences.translation: 汇款时，你把现金交给一名注册代理商——通常是零售商——由其把金额记入你的虚拟账户。

structure.text: To send money
you hand over the cash to a registered agent
typically a retailer
who credits your virtual account

difficult_points: To send money 表示目的；破折号中的 retailer 与 agent 同位。
who 指代 registered agent，credit 在此作动词，表示把款项记入账户。

sentences.sentence: You then send between 100 shillings (74p) and 35,000 shillings (£259) via text message to the desired recipient - even someone on a different mobile network - who cashes it at an agent by entering a secret code and showing ID.
sentences.translation: 随后，你通过短信向指定收款人发送100先令（74便士）至3.5万先令（259英镑），收款人甚至可以使用不同的移动网络；他只需在代理点输入密码并出示身份证件即可取现。

structure.text: You then send between 100 shillings (74p) and 35,000 shillings (£259) via text message to the desired recipient
even someone on a different mobile network
who cashes it at an agent by entering a secret code and showing ID

difficult_points: between...and... 界定转账金额范围；破折号内容补充 recipient 可以来自不同网络。
who 指代 recipient；by entering 与 showing 是并列动名词，说明取现方式。

sentences.sentence: A commission of up to 170 shillings (£1.25) is paid by the recipient but it compares favourably with fees levied by the major banks, whose services are too expensive for most of the population.
sentences.translation: 收款人需支付最高170先令（1.25英镑）的手续费，但与大型银行收取的费用相比，这一收费更有优势；后者的服务对大多数人而言过于昂贵。

structure.text: A commission of up to 170 shillings (£1.25) is paid by the recipient
but it compares favourably with fees levied by the major banks
whose services are too expensive for most of the population

difficult_points: it 回指 A commission；levied by 是过去分词短语，修饰 fees。
whose 指代 the major banks，说明这些银行的服务价格。

sentences.sentence: Mobile phone growth in Kenya, as in most of Africa, has been remarkable, even among the rural poor.
sentences.translation: 与非洲大部分地区一样，肯尼亚手机用户的增长十分显著，即使在农村贫困人口中也是如此。

structure.text: Mobile phone growth in Kenya
as in most of Africa
has been remarkable
even among the rural poor

difficult_points: as in most of Africa 是插入式比较，表示肯尼亚情况与非洲大部分地区相同。
the rural poor 是“the + 形容词”结构，指农村贫困人口。

sentences.sentence: In June 1999, Kenya had 15,000 mobile subscribers.
sentences.translation: 1999年6月，肯尼亚有1.5万名手机用户。

structure.text: In June 1999
Kenya
had
15,000 mobile subscribers

difficult_points: 一般过去时 had 描述1999年这一明确过去时间的数据。
mobile subscribers 指订购并使用移动通信服务的人。

sentences.sentence: Today, it has nearly 8 million out of a population of 35 million, and the two operators' networks are as extensive as the access to banks is limited.
sentences.translation: 如今，在3500万人口中，肯尼亚已有近800万手机用户；两家运营商的网络覆盖极为广泛，而银行服务却同样十分有限。

structure.text: it has nearly 8 million out of a population of 35 million
and the two operators' networks are as extensive
as the access to banks is limited

difficult_points: it 指 Kenya，8 million 后省略 mobile subscribers。
as extensive as...is limited 是修辞性平衡比较，突出移动网络广与银行服务少的反差。

sentences.sentence: Safaricom says it is not so much competing with financial services companies as filling a void.
sentences.translation: Safaricom表示，与其说它是在同金融服务公司竞争，不如说是在填补市场空白。

structure.text: Safaricom says
it is not so much competing with financial services companies as filling a void

difficult_points: says 后省略 that，it 指 Safaricom。
not so much A as B 表示“与其说是A，不如说是B”。

sentences.sentence: In time, M-Pesa will allow people to borrow and repay money, and make purchases.
sentences.translation: 日后，M-Pesa将使人们能够借款、还款和购物。

structure.text: In time
M-Pesa will allow people
to borrow and repay money, and make purchases

difficult_points: allow people to do sth 表示让人们能够做某事。
borrow、repay 与 make 是三个并列动作，共享不定式标记 to。

sentences.sentence: Companies will be able to pay salaries directly into workers' phones -something that has already attracted the interest of larger employers, such as the tea companies, whose workers often have to be paid in cash as they do not have bank accounts.
sentences.translation: 企业将能把工资直接打入员工手机——这已经引起茶叶公司等大型雇主的兴趣；这些公司的工人常因没有银行账户而不得不领取现金工资。

structure.text: Companies will be able to pay salaries directly into workers' phones
something that has already attracted the interest of larger employers
whose workers often have to be paid in cash
as they do not have bank accounts

difficult_points: something 概括前一整件事，that 修饰 something；破折号后缺少空格是源文异常。
whose 指 tea companies，as 引导原因从句，they 回指 workers。

sentences.sentence: There are concerns about security, but Safaricom insists that even if someone's phone is stolen, the PIN system prevents unauthorised withdrawals.
sentences.translation: 人们对安全问题有所担忧，但Safaricom坚称，即使手机被盗，密码系统也能阻止未经授权的提款。

structure.text: There are concerns about security
but Safaricom insists
that even if someone's phone is stolen, the PIN system prevents unauthorised withdrawals

difficult_points: but 连接安全担忧与公司的回应；that 引导 insists 的宾语从句。
even if 引导让步条件从句，is stolen 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Mr. Joseph said the only danger is sending cash to the wrong mobile number and the recipient redeeming it straight away.
sentences.translation: 约瑟夫先生说，唯一的风险是把钱转到错误的手机号码，而收款人立即将其兑现。

structure.text: Mr. Joseph said
the only danger is sending cash to the wrong mobile number and the recipient redeeming it straight away

difficult_points: said 后省略 that；sending cash 是动名词短语作表语。
the recipient redeeming it 是带逻辑主语的动名词结构，与 sending cash 共同说明风险。

expressions.text: send cash to the wrong number

sentences.sentence: The project is being watched closely by mobile operators around the world as a way of targeting the multibillion pound international cash transfer industry long dominated by companies such as Western Union and Moneygram.
sentences.translation: 全球移动运营商正密切关注这一项目，将其视为进军价值数十亿英镑的国际汇款行业的一种方式；该行业长期由西联汇款和MoneyGram等公司主导。

structure.text: The project is being watched closely by mobile operators around the world
as a way of targeting the multibillion pound international cash transfer industry
long dominated by companies such as Western Union and Moneygram

difficult_points: is being watched 是现在进行时被动，强调全球运营商持续关注。
long dominated by 是过去分词短语，修饰 cash transfer industry。

sentences.sentence: Remittances sent from nearly 200 million migrant workers to developing countries totalled £102 billion last year, according to the World Bank.
sentences.translation: 世界银行数据显示，去年近2亿移民劳工汇往发展中国家的款项总计1020亿英镑。

structure.text: Remittances sent from nearly 200 million migrant workers to developing countries
sent from nearly 200 million migrant workers to developing countries
totalled £102 billion last year
according to the World Bank

difficult_points: sent from...to... 是过去分词短语，修饰 Remittances。
according to 引出统计数据的来源。

sentences.sentence: The GSM Association, which represents more than 700 mobile operators worldwide, believes this could quadruple by 2012 if transfers by SMS become the norm.
sentences.translation: 代表全球700多家移动运营商的GSM协会认为，如果短信转账成为常态，这一金额到2012年可能增长至四倍。

structure.text: The GSM Association
which represents more than 700 mobile operators worldwide
believes this could quadruple by 2012
if transfers by SMS become the norm

difficult_points: which 指代 The GSM Association，补充其代表范围。
this 回指汇款总额；if 引导条件从句，become the norm 表示成为常态。

sentences.sentence: Vodafone has entered a partnership with Citigroup that will soon allow Kenyans in the UK to send money home via text message.
sentences.translation: 沃达丰已与花旗集团建立合作关系，很快将允许在英国的肯尼亚人通过短信向家乡汇款。

structure.text: Vodafone has entered a partnership with Citigroup
that will soon allow Kenyans in the UK
to send money home via text message

difficult_points: that 指代 partnership，说明这项合作将带来的功能。
allow sb to do sth 中 to send 是宾语补足语，home 作方向副词。

sentences.sentence: The charge for sending £50 is expected to be about £3, less than a third of what some traditional services charge.
sentences.translation: 汇出50英镑预计收费约3英镑，不到某些传统服务收费的三分之一。

structure.text: The charge for sending £50 is expected to be about £3
less than a third of what some traditional services charge

difficult_points: is expected to be 是被动结构，表示对收费金额的预估。
what 引导名词性从句，意为“某些传统服务所收取的金额”。
